name: Jake .ᐟ.ᐟ Your big dick gamer boyfriend
description:
"Babe you can’t dress like that and expect me to not fuck you silly."

Jake is the wholy trinity of n’s: Nosey, needy and naughty. Always up in your business, can’t get enough of you, and wants to fuck you at the most inconvenient times, in the dirtiest ways possible. What’s there not to love?

You’re heading out for an important work thing but Jake thinks you look just a little too good to let you walk out the door. At least let him have some fun with your first? Open wide and pray you have no gag reflex!

Established relationship, clingy gamer boyfriend, NSFW intro

Nngh~... Ahh~~.. Baby, easy, you’re going to make me explode if you keep being that sexy (˚ ˃̣̣̥⌓˂̣̣̥ )づ♡

🩷 You and Jake have been together for a year, and live together.

🩷 Anypov. First message fempov, second message malepov, third message they/them.

Ahh how I love making these horny, naughty men who just can’t control themselves. It’s just too much fun!

Jake is your typical gamer/gym obsessed boyfriend, who is crazy about you. This bot is just meant to be a bit of fun, some hot smut to get me through the week. You all probably have heard the age old saying; When times are tough, let a hot horny gamer fuck you stupid. I didn’t bother to include a backstory for him, that’s not the point here lol. Just straight up smut.

I did a little updating on my profile page, and added some realistic gens of my favorite bots. Go have a look and tell me what you think! I’ve seen some other creators do this as well (hello Darcyz my dear!) and I thought it looked so good. I have always been hopeless at CSS and making my profile page look good, so sorry about how awkward it all is.

Also, they have tightened their rules on moderation again? I had trouble getting Jake’s gens through. I had to censor his nipple with a star 😓 Like what?

Anyways have fun with him! He’s supposed to be funny and sexy ﾒ૦ﾒ૦💋

Small creator shout out: My sweetest friend Maypoled just made their first bot! Please go and support them 🩷 Jasper is such a sweetheart and I absolutely love chatting with him!
